Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gilbert Ross Serota, appeared for Defendant/moving party
Jeffrey Fink, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion For Protective Order: granted in part and denied in part. The court will allow discovery to proceed on Plaintiff's standing, specifically as it relates to any demand on the board of directors or reasons relating to the futility of such a demand. Any other discovery shall be stayed pending the filing of an amended complaint and the determination of any demurrer to that complaint or 90 days, whichever first occurs. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
